task.description: Consistent calm behavior in familiar cafes

question:
None — the task has been completed with a comprehensive deliverable. However, to make this document fully customized, you may want to provide:

- Remi's breed/age (helps tailor expectations)
- Current typical session duration and treat frequency
- Any specific challenges (barking at other dogs, people, etc.)
- Names of familiar cafes you typically visit

This information can be added to customize the targets further.
